creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
bump PORTREVISION of net-p2p/transmission-daemon for ftp/curl update, so that ${LOCALBASE}/bin/transmission-remote links to libcurl.so.6 and not libcurl.so.5

How-To-Repeat: Try running transmision-remote on a system with ftp/curl updated to version 7.20.0 but without net-p2p/transmission-daemon rebuilt. You will get an ldd error.
